Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR when the preceding activity is Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION versus when it is Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases that eventually lead to rejection by PRE_APPROVER in a re-submission cycle
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants without any rejection versus variants with at least one Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to be performed after Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER compared to after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in re-submitted cases where the second submission includes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful variants (ending in Payment Handled) versus variants that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER upon resubmission
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases that previously experienced a Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR when it directly follows Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE, compared to when it follows any approval step
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after Request Payment is not yet triggered, indicating premature final approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in high-frequency variants versus low-frequency variants involving PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that skip the budget owner approval, compared to those that include Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases declared within two months after the trip versus cases declared immediately after cost payment, as inferred from case timing patterns
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case
